title: You Dropped This
description: A simple mod to play sounds when items are dropped and when they hit the ground.
body:
A simple mod to play sounds when items are dropped and when they hit the ground.

Items being dropped by players, items dropped from player death, items dropped from mob death, and items hitting the ground can all make sounds.
By default players dropping items and items hitting the ground are enabled, and make dispenser launching sounds and hitting cloth sounds, respectively.

It can be set so any unspecified item plays a sound, specific items play specific noises, or both.
For specific noises per item the format is "itemname;soundevent" in the configuration file.
